notes: S3G3-TC051: Recorded Dashboard KPIs (Total=15, In Production=3, Completed Today=0, Quality Hold=1). Submitted ORD-015 (Draft->Submitted) via order detail action button. Returned to Dashboard, verified KPI Total Orders updated to 16 reflecting current state.
